mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_role
deleted_at IS NULL
AND (name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR role_code LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 1
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT dept_id FROM sys_role_dept WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
